zh: 《黑執事 幽鬼城殺人事件篇》OVA 製作決定！自 2014 年秋季起開始劇場先行上映！
ja: 「黒執事」“幽鬼城殺人事件編”OVA制作決定!! 2014年秋より劇場先行上映開始!
en: An OVA adaptation of the "Phantomhive Manor Murder Case" arc from the Black Butler series. This special project had advanced theatrical screenings in Japan starting in the fall of 2014 before its release.
